name: unifi-mcp
description: UniFi network management via MCP tools. Monitor devices, clients, network health, firewall rules, and perform management operations.

unifi_mcp_url.title: UniFi MCP Server URL
unifi_mcp_url.description: URL of the unifi-mcp MCP server. Default http://localhost:8001 works if running via docker compose in this repo. Change if running on a different host or port.

unifi_controller_url.title: UniFi Controller URL
unifi_controller_url.description: URL of your UniFi controller, e.g. https://192.168.1.1:443. No trailing slash.
